title: Touno
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Touno |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Slovenly? If I had the troops they do in the north…"
"If you were the sort of leader they have in the north…|High General Touno and [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]|[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 1|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 1]]}} [[High General]] '''Touno''' was the commander of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison in the southern district of [[Svivren]] as of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. A portly [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with brown eyes and thinning brown hair, he was a reflection of the sparse and badly-disciplined troops he had under his command. One of his staff officers was [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Strok (Galactic Empire)|Strok]], who was actually working for the organized crime group [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]] {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 1|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 6|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 6]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Touno }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Army generals of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
